caption:
"Want to win prizes at the #UICHousingTakeover tomorrow? Complete our scavenger hunt!

RULES:
-Follow @UICHousing on Instagram
-All pictures must be taken at the Jan. 27 Men’s Basketball Housing Takeover Game
-Tag @UICHousing & use #UICHousingTakeover in your post
-All entries must be posted by Jan. 29. -We ask that PRIVATE accounts are made PUBLIC during the giveaway in order to be entered. -Winners will be determined by completion of scavenger hunt and creativity and announced Jan. 31.".
